name: soapysdr0.8-module-mirisdr
title: soapysdr0.8-module-mirisdr
summary: Mirics SDR device support for SoapySDR
description:
Mirics SDR device support for SoapySDR
The SoapyOsmo project provides SoapySDR hardware support modules using
drivers in gr-osmosdr. Using this, any program using SoapySDR to
interface to software defined radio hardware can make use of OsmoSDR,
Mirics SDR, and RFSpace SDR devices.
.
This package contains the hardware support module for Mirics SDR
devices.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use soapysdr0.8-module-mirisdr because Mirics SDR device support for SoapySDR.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use soapysdr0.8-module-mirisdr as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair soapysdr0.8-module-mirisdr with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `soapysdr0.8-module-mirisdr --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
